news.title: Nvidia CEO brands Taiwan 'epicentre' of AI revolution
news.description: Nvidia's chief executive has said the chip company plans to invest around $150 billion a year in Taiwan, terming it the "epicentre" of the AI revolution and predicting it will be the world's tech manufacturing hub for a long time.

news.title: AI rally: SK Hynix, Micron Technology join trillion-dollar club; Taiwan bourse overtakes India in market value
news.description: The AI boom is fueling a surge in chipmakers like SK Hynix, Samsung, and Micron, pushing them into the $1 trillion market-cap club. This global tech rally has propelled Taiwan past India in market value, highlighting the dominance of AI-driven semiconductor g…

news.title: Taiwan chip stocks climb after Nvidia announces $150 billion spending plans
news.description: Mainland China-based chip giants such as Cambricon saw their shares tumble on Wednesday.

news.title: The Qualcomm-ByteDance ASIC deal works around US export controls by design

news.title: Sarthak PDS: Cabinet clears Rs 25,000-crore overhaul of public distribution system
news.description: The Union Cabinet has approved the Rs 25,000-crore Sarthak Public Distribution System scheme. This initiative aims to modernize India's food security network. It will strengthen fair price shops and improve the distribution of food grains. The scheme focuses …

news.title: CXMT receives Shanghai bourse approval for IPO on Star Market
news.description:
CXMT's IPO approval highlights China's push for semiconductor self-sufficiency, potentially reshaping global tech supply chains and competition.
The post CXMT receives Shanghai bourse approval for IPO on Star Market appeared first on Crypto Briefing.

news.description: Does substantial GPU power draw and liquid cooling mean the end of the on-premise datacentre? We look at the AI factory revolution and find that a hybrid path for enterprises will likely still exist
